name: pixellab-pip
description: Routes PixelLab asset/API requests across MCP, REST v2, website/editor workflows, Aseprite, Pixelorama, and legacy v1.

interface.shortDescription: Routes PixelLab asset and API requests.
interface.longDescription: PixelLab Pip helps agents choose the right PixelLab surface for asset creation, editing, animation, API integration, MCP setup, and docs troubleshooting.
defaultPrompt: Use PixelLab Pip to choose the right PixelLab route for this asset or API request.
